import React from 'react' import c from './add.module.scss' import { Icons } from '../../assets/icons' const AddExpense = ({ setActive }) => { const [count, setCount] = React.useState(1) const [data, setData] = React.useState([{ name: '', amount: '', expense: '', price: '' }]) const handleChange = (index, field, value) => { const newData = [...data] newData[index] = { ...newData[index], [field]: value } setData(newData) } const handleAddForm = () => { setCount(prev => prev + 1) setData(prev => [...prev, { name: '', amount: '', expense: '', price: '' }]) } console.log(data); return (
